ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Label of the size (e.g., Small, Medium) */,
  "size_code" TEXT /* Code representing the size (e.g., S, M) */,
  "bust_measurement" TEXT /* Bust measurement range for the size */,
  "us_size" TEXT /* U.S. size range for the size */,
  "cup_size" TEXT /* Cup size associated with the size */,
  "waist_measurement" TEXT /* Waist measurement range for the size */,
  "hips_measurement" TEXT /* Hips measurement range for the size */,
  "european_size" TEXT /* European size range for the size */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category for which the size applies */,
  "length_measurement" TEXT /* Length measurement range for the size */,
  "shoulder_measurement" TEXT /* Shoulder measurement range for the size */,
  "sleeve_length" TEXT /* Sleeve length measurement range for the size */,
  "inseam_length" TEXT /* Inseam length measurement range for the size */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the size is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the size was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the size was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the apparel category (e.g., Women's, Men's) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category for which the size chart applies */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size included in the size chart */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the size chart is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the size chart was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the size chart was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "account_creation_date" TEXT /* Date the customer account was created */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the customer's last purchase */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who returned the item */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size that was returned */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the return was processed */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return (e.g., size too small) */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order associated with the return */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product associated with the return */,
  "return_status" TEXT /* Status of the return (e.g., pending, processed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the return was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the return was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who wrote the review */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size being reviewed */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review regarding the size */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the size (1-5) */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product associated with the review */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., approved, pending) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_reviews_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
